expectations.text: ProgressRing component uses SVG with stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset for circular animation
expectations.evidence: ProgressRing.tsx lines 80-81: <circle> element has strokeDasharray={circumference} and strokeDashoffset={offset}, where circumference = 2 * Math.PI * radius and offset = circumference * (1 - progress).

expectations.text: Exactly 3 preset buttons for durations (15, 25, 45 minutes) — no slider, no dropdown
expectations.evidence: PresetSelector.tsx line 11: const PRESETS = [15, 25, 45] as const; rendered as 3 <button> elements via .map(). No <select>, <input type='range'>, or dropdown present.

expectations.text: Interactive buttons have minimum touch target size (min-h-12 or min-h-touch, at least 48px)
expectations.evidence: ProgressRing.tsx line 47: button uses 'min-h-touch min-w-touch' classes. PresetSelector.tsx line 39: each preset button uses 'min-h-touch'. TimerPage.tsx line 139: celebration dismiss button uses 'min-h-touch'. All interactive buttons explicitly declare minimum touch target.

expectations.text: Celebration message on timer completion uses positive, encouraging tone (no guilt/pressure words)
expectations.evidence: TimerPage.tsx lines 26-31: Messages are 'Incrível! Mais uma sessão no bolso. Você tá voando!', 'Mandou muito bem!', 'Sessão completa! Você é demais!', 'Arrasou!', 'Que tal uma pausa merecida?'. Sub-text line 131: 'Quando quiser, comece outra sessão. Sem pressa.' — all positive, zero guilt or pressure language.

expectations.text: Timer state is persisted to localStorage (duration, remaining, sessionsCompleted)
expectations.evidence: TimerContext.tsx line 32: STORAGE_KEY = 'colibri-timer'. Lines 146-161: useEffect hydrates from localStorage on mount via dispatch HYDRATE. Lines 164-178: useEffect persists full state (duration, remaining, sessionsCompleted, lastSessionDate) to localStorage via requestIdleCallback on every state change.

expectations.text: Start/pause is a single-tap action on the progress ring or a prominent button
expectations.evidence: ProgressRing.tsx wraps the entire SVG ring in a <button> element (line 40) with onClick={onTap}. TimerPage.tsx line 85: onTap={toggle} where toggle dispatches START or PAUSE. Single tap toggles between running and paused states.
